metadata.description: Engineering flow skills — idea to passing E2E.

plugins.name: e2e-engineering
plugins.description: Master engineering orchestrator: phase-adaptive flow, hard gates (4 & 5 stubbed pending automation), vertical-slice TDD loop with parallel worktree subagents + expert-review wave. Greenfield/feature/bugfix/refactor + adopt mode. Headless implementation via /e2e-flight (one Task per spawn, no loop — ADR 0022).
